calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property
Off Calendar May-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder for Casey Jacobson and Katie Stine (petitioners/co-trustees).

The court waives the issue of venue. Mr. Feder spoke of the trustor's medical condition, explained circumstances regarding the trustor not being able to get to the banks, and explained that the reason why he added $10.00 to schedule A was because they had to move quickly, and he wanted the trust to be funded to make sure that the trust was established. Mr. Feder also stated that the Trustor was very clear that she intended for all of the bank accounts to be part of the trust and that he is aware that the court is declining the $1,000.00 gift. The Petition Confirming Certain Assets are Trust Property is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition. Mr. Feder provided a proposed order.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Continued To May-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
